description: SendCanary DMARC setup: publishes a DMARC TXT record that tells receiving inboxes (Google, Microsoft, Yahoo, etc.) how to handle email that fails authentication from this domain - monitor (p=none), quarantine (p=quarantine), or reject (p=reject). Aggregate and forensic reports are routed to SendCanary's per-tenant endpoint so you get visibility into who is sending email as you and can act on spoofing attempts. SendCanary (https://sendcanary.com) is an email authentication platform that monitors DMARC reports, detects spoofing, and automates DNS remediation for domain owners.
variableDescription: token: per-domain identifier SendCanary assigns for DMARC report routing (lowercased 12-char hex, e.g. 9a9d452a1442). policy: DMARC policy enforcement level - 'none' for monitoring, 'quarantine' to send failing mail to spam, 'reject' to block it entirely.
